CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Second Set Of Discovery And For Sanctions Against Defendant Betterdoctor, Inc. And Its Attorneys
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vladie Viltman, of Law Office of Brian Soriano, Tel. 415.593.7333, for plaintiffs;
Pietari Grohn, of GC+, Tel. 650.956.9693, for defendants BetterDoctor, Inc.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA ANGELES Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Second Set Of Discovery And For Sanctions Against Defendant Betterdoctor, Inc. And Its Attorneys is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition To Compel Plaintiff Joshua Angeles To Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings Against Defendants
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. VLADIE VILTMAN, ESQ., Tel No. (415) 336-8395 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS KAREO, INC. AND DAN RODRIGUES' Petition To Compel Plaintiff Joshua Angeles To Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings Against Defendants, Defendants Kareo, Inc. and Dan Rodrigues' motion to compel arbitration and stay the case pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings is denied. When parties have agreed to be governed by California law, as is the case here, CCP 1281.2(c) does not conflict with the FAA or frustrate its objectives. (Mastick v. TD Ameritrade, Inc. (2012) 209 Cal.App.4th 1258, 1263.) Although here is an arbitration agreement covering plaintiff's claims against Kareo, Inc. and Mr. Rodrigues, there is no arbitration agreement covering plaintiff's claims against BetterDoctor, Inc. While the legal basis of liability alleged against BetterDoctor is different than the legal basis of liability alleged against Kareo and Mr. Rodrigues, all of plaintiff's claims depend on a determination that the non-compete contract is unenforceable and all of the claims are based on the same common set of facts. Thus, there is a significant risk that if some of the claims were arbitrated, there would be conflicting rulings on issues of law or fact regarding the enforceability of the contract. Also, judicial economy favors resolution of all plaintiff's claims in one forum and the court is the only forum where that can occur. Accordingly, the court exercise its discretion under 1281.2 to deny this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
